creator: the_mix_room@hotmail.com
text:
When I try to update my pkg-repo with the new pkg-1.5.0 over SSH it fails due to a missing meta.txz
Updating the same repo mounted over NFS works fine, updating the same repo on locally on another machine works fine.
Pkg repo is my own. 

I have posted more info on https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/pkg-broken-after-update-to-1-5-0.51270/
